item.description:

Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), corruption(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Milk vouchers better way to prevent stunting among kids
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Galen Centre for Health and Social Policy says that a targeted approach will ensure children consume milk regularly without adding to the financial burden of B40 households.
Matched: policy(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Clear as day, FAM at fault in forgery case, says MP
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
PKR's Wong Chen asks why police have not arrested anyone yet.

item.title: MPs slam poor coordination after bill to limit PM’s tenure fails

Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Activists rally for Indonesians facing possible jail terms over 2025 riots
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Pig heads found outside house, shop in Kuala Pilah and Tampin
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Negeri Sembilan police chief Alzafny Ahmad says the incidents are believed to have stemmed from a personal dispute between the victims and an alleged unlicensed moneylender.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Hold internal ballot on PM candidate, PN advised
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Analyst suggests that the PN Supreme Council choose from among six leaders: Samsuri, Muhyiddin, Hadi, Tuan Ibrahim, Radzi and Azmin.
Matched: parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Muhyiddin’s leadership dilemma as GE16 looms
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Analysts say Muhyiddin Yassin will signal renewal if he passes on the Bersatu presidency before the polls, but doing so now could heighten infighting and uncertainty.
Matched: parliament(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)
